'''ngothanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylogenous|xylogenous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylogenous|xylogenous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngothanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothanithi|ngothanithi]] || [[word:ngothaniji|ngothaniji]] || [[word:ngothanishi|ngothanishi]] || [[word:ngothaniki|ngothaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothanuthuthu|ngothanuthuthu]] || [[word:ngothanujuju|ngothanujuju]] || [[word:ngothanushushu|ngothanushushu]] || [[word:ngothanukuku|ngothanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothanuthu|ngothanuthu]] || [[word:ngothanuju|ngothanuju]] || [[word:ngothanushu|ngothanushu]] || [[word:ngothanuku|ngothanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothanufthuf|ngothanufthuf]] || [[word:ngothanufjuf|ngothanufjuf]] || [[word:ngothanufshuf|ngothanufshuf]] || [[word:ngothanufkuf|ngothanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothanethe|ngothanethe]] || [[word:ngothaneje|ngothaneje]] || [[word:ngothaneshe|ngothaneshe]] || [[word:ngothaneke|ngothaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothanothotho|ngothanothotho]] || [[word:ngothanojojo|ngothanojojo]] || [[word:ngothanoshosho|ngothanoshosho]] || [[word:ngothanokoko|ngothanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothanotho|ngothanotho]] || [[word:ngothanojo|ngothanojo]] || [[word:ngothanosho|ngothanosho]] || [[word:ngothanoko|ngothanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothanofthof|ngothanofthof]] || [[word:ngothanofjof|ngothanofjof]] || [[word:ngothanofshof|ngothanofshof]] || [[word:ngothanofkof|ngothanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothanĂŠthĂŠ|ngothanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothanĂŠjĂŠ|ngothanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothanĂŠshĂŠ|ngothanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothanĂŠkĂŠ|ngothanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothanathatha|ngothanathatha]] || [[word:ngothanajaja|ngothanajaja]] || [[word:ngothanashasha|ngothanashasha]] || [[word:ngothanakaka|ngothanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothanatha|ngothanatha]] || [[word:ngothanaja|ngothanaja]] || [[word:ngothanasha|ngothanasha]] || [[word:ngothanaka|ngothanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothanafthaf|ngothanafthaf]] || [[word:ngothanafjaf|ngothanafjaf]] || [[word:ngothanafshaf|ngothanafshaf]] || [[word:ngothanafkaf|ngothanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngothanasha|ngothanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothanshĂ«asha|ngothanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothanroasha|ngothanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothanmuasha|ngothanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothanyaasha|ngothanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothannkshĂ«asha|gongothannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothannkroasha|gongothannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothannkmuasha|gongothannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothannkyaasha|gongothannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngothathanasha|ngothathanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothathanshĂ«asha|ngothathanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothathanroasha|ngothathanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothathanmuasha|ngothathanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothathanyaasha|ngothathanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothathannkshĂ«asha|gongothathannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothathannkroasha|gongothathannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothathannkmuasha|gongothathannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothathannkyaasha|gongothathannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngethĂŠnasha|ngethĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngethĂŠnshĂ«asha|ngethĂŠnshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngethĂŠnroasha|ngethĂŠnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngethĂŠnmuasha|ngethĂŠnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngethĂŠnyaasha|ngethĂŠnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongethĂŠnnkshĂ«asha|gongethĂŠnnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongethĂŠnnkroasha|gongethĂŠnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongethĂŠnnkmuasha|gongethĂŠnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongethĂŠnnkyaasha|gongethĂŠnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngothfanasha|ngothfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothfanshĂ«asha|ngothfanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothfanroasha|ngothfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothfanmuasha|ngothfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothfanyaasha|ngothfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothfannkshĂ«asha|gongothfannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothfannkroasha|gongothfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothfannkmuasha|gongothfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothfannkyaasha|gongothfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
